tool_calls_made.name: handoff_to_structured

arguments.reason: Venue search returned no results despite multiple parameter adjustments. Need human input to resolve ambiguity in venue criteria.
arguments.context: Tried 7 different venue_search combinations with varying areas (Edinburgh City Center, Old Town, Grassmarket, Castle, Edinburgh) and party sizes (5-50) but all returned 0 results. Likely missing specific venue requirements or facing data limitations.
